name: dockge
description: A Pulumi provider for managing Dockge stacks via the REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:5001)

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:5001)

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

url.description: The URL of the Dockge server

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Dockge REST API

dockge:index:DockgeContainerInfo.description: Information about a container within a Dockge stack.

dockge:index:DockgeStack.description: Manages a Docker Compose stack on a Dockge server via the REST API. Supports creating, updating, starting, stopping, and deleting stacks.

name.description: The stack name. Must be unique on the Dockge server.

composeYaml.description: The Docker Compose YAML content for this stack.

envFile.description: Optional .env file content for the stack.

running.description: Whether the stack should be running (default: true).

status.description: The current stack status (running, exited, stopped, partial, unknown).

containers.description: Information about the containers in this stack.

nodejs.packageDescription: A Pulumi provider for managing Dockge stacks
